title: Docker Containerization
description: Packaging applications with all dependencies into portable containers. Ensures consistency across development, testing, and production environments.

title: Kubernetes Orchestration
description: Container orchestration platform for automating deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications.

title: CI/CD Pipeline Design
description: Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment/Delivery automates building, testing, and deploying code changes. Reduces manual errors and speeds up delivery.
best_practices: Automate all build and test steps

title: GitOps
description: Using Git as single source of truth for declarative infrastructure and applications. Changes are made via pull requests and automatically applied to the target environment.

title: Canary Deployment
description: Gradually rolling out changes to a small subset of users before deploying to the entire infrastructure. Reduces risk of deploying faulty releases.
best_practices: Use feature flags for granular control

title: Blue-Green Deployment
description: Maintains two identical production environments. Traffic is switched from blue (current) to green (new) after validation, enabling instant rollback.

title: Infrastructure Monitoring
description: Monitoring infrastructure components: servers, containers, networks, databases. Essential for capacity planning, performance optimization, and incident detection.

title: Secrets Management in CI/CD
description: Securely managing sensitive data within CI/CD pipelines. Secrets should never be hardcoded in repositories or pipeline configurations.
best_practices: Use OIDC for cloud provider authentication
anti_patterns: Plain text secrets in CI/CD config
